name: 隐形模特

prompt_template.subject: {product_description}
prompt_template.form: invisible mannequin creating natural 3D body shape
prompt_template.details: natural shoulder slope, bust/chest contour, waist curve visible
prompt_template.background: clean white or soft gray gradient

defaults.form: natural body contours - shoulders, bust, waist
defaults.lighting: three-point studio setup creating gentle dimension

overrides.background: moody dark gradient from charcoal to deep gray
overrides.lighting: spotlight from above creating dramatic highlight on shoulders

overrides.details: garment partially open revealing inner lining tag, rolled sleeves showing lining contrast

overrides.background: minimal studio with subtle editorial prop - single branch or flower in corner

category_tips.shirts: collar standing naturally, top buttons detail, cuff visibility
category_tips.dresses: natural waist cinch, skirt drape showing fabric weight, back zipper detail
category_tips.coats: architectural shoulder structure, fabric texture visible, button and pocket details
category_tips.knitwear: visible knit pattern and texture, natural stretch around body contours
category_tips.tshirts: casual relaxed drape, crew or v-neck sitting naturally, sleeve length proportion
category_tips.activewear: compression fit showing body contour, moisture-wicking fabric texture, logo placement

examples: Ghost mannequin photography. {product} on invisible mannequin, natural body contours visible. Fabric drapes naturally showing material weight. Pure white background. Soft studio lighting, 8K, fashion e-commerce standard

Premium ghost mannequin photography. {product} on invisible mannequin, garment partially open revealing inner lining. Background: soft warm gray gradient. Three-point studio lighting, Phase One quality, 8K
